## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Tracked-app configuration change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (format, lint, types, tests, data validation, build)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests where practical
- [ ] No secrets, credentials or personal data are included
- [ ] Store scraping stays rate-conscious (no aggressive polling)
